case_title: P PATEL VS. ROY STEELE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, P AS TO DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE (JURY FEES AND EXPENSES; COURT REPORTER FEES) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF ROY STEELE ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROY STEELE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTER FEES. ROY STEELE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR #12365 (206)
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT STEELE, ROY HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROY STEELE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS.FEE WAIVER DENIED. ROY STEELE HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR #12365 (206)
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: ANSWER WAS ALREADY STRICKEN FOR NON PAYMENT OF FEES. THERE ARE NO OTHER FILINGS TO STRIKE.
